tasks.prompt:
Continue the autonomous Google Ads agent development. Read the current state of C:/dev/google-ads-agent-api to understand what was last committed. Then continue from where you left off, following the Red-Green-Refactor TDD cycle from CLAUDE.md:

Tick cycle to follow:
1. Write RED test (must fail first)
2. Run test to confirm it fails
3. Write GREEN minimal implementation  
4. Run test to confirm it passes
5. Commit
6. Adversarial review: Red Agent challenges the implementation
7. Move to next task

Always check git log and git status first to understand where you are. Work through the implementation plan tasks in order: Phase 1 (DB schema, DB adapter), then Phase 2 (API routes), then Phase 3 (MCP), Phase 4 (agents), Phase 5 (research loop), Phase 6 (deploy).
